# useQRCode

Wrapper for .

**Package:** `@vueuse/integrations`
**Category:** '@Integrations'

## Usage

```ts
import { useQRCode } from '@vueuse/integrations/useQRCode'

// `qrcode` will be a ref of data URL
const qrcode = useQRCode('text-to-encode')
```
